name: Collins State Bank
description_short: Collins State Bank is a community bank offering checking, savings, online banking, and lending products with over 100 years of service history.
description_long:
Collins State Bank is a traditional community bank that has served its local communities for more than a century. The institution positions itself as a relationship-focused alternative to larger national banks, emphasizing knowledgeable, friendly, and local service. The bank maintains physical branch locations and provides both in-person and digital banking options.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of retail banking services including checking and savings accounts, mobile and online banking platforms, lending products (home equity loans and HELOCs), and bill payment services. Customers can access accounts 24/7 through online banking, deposit checks via mobile app, transfer funds between accounts, manage payees, and send money through Zelle. The bank also provides debit card fraud protection through SecureLOCK Equip and operates a kids' savings club (Banker Buck Kids Club) for financial education.

Collins State Bank distinguishes itself through its emphasis on community banking and local presence, multi-channel access including phone banking (1-866-953-4433), and advanced security features such as Out of Band authentication for online banking. The institution promotes educational tools including financial calculators and actively uses social media engagement through Facebook. Their routing number (075908276) and comprehensive customer service infrastructure suggest an established regional operation.

As a traditional community bank, Collins State Bank serves customers seeking local relationship banking with modern digital conveniences. The bank appears well-suited for customers in their service area who value personal service alongside technological accessibility. However, the website provides limited information about deposit rates, loan terms, fee structures, or specific product details, making comprehensive rate and cost comparison difficult for prospective customers.
services: Mobile banking app with check deposit
pros: Over 100 years of community banking history and established local presence
Advanced security authentication using Out of Band verification for online banking
24/7 online and mobile banking access with check deposit capability via mobile app
Multiple contact channels including telephone banking, online banking, and in-branch service
Zelle integration for fast peer-to-peer money transfers
SecureLOCK Equip fraud protection for all debit cards
Educational products including Banker Buck Kids Club for teaching children savings habits
cons: Website provides no information about deposit rates, APYs, or loan rates for comparison
Limited details on account fees, minimum balance requirements, or product-specific terms
No transparent disclosure of which specific loan products are available or their eligibility criteria
Geographic service limitations implied by 'community bank' model — may not serve all areas
Website lacks detailed product documentation, fee schedule visibility, or downloadable disclosures from homepage
best_for: Customers in Collins State Bank's service area seeking relationship banking with local staff
Individuals who value community banking over large national bank impersonal service
Families interested in teaching children financial literacy through structured savings programs
Customers seeking multi-channel banking (branch, phone, mobile, online) in a single institution
diagnosis: Collins State Bank is best for regional customers seeking traditional community banking with modern digital conveniences and local relationship service. The main caveat is that the website provides minimal transparency on rates, fees, and specific loan terms, requiring direct contact with the bank for detailed product information and cost comparison.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
